_README: Hand-edit this file to change what the portfolio shows. The 'activity' (latest commits / last-updated) is generated automatically every day by portfolio/update.py into data/activity.json — you do not edit that one. Match a project to its live activity with the 'repo' field ('owner/name').

profile.name: Agangwani
profile._name_note: Replace with your full display name if you'd like (e.g. 'Aakash Gangwani').
profile.tagline: I build practical, end-to-end tools — from ML-powered job search to interactive music education.

links._email_note: Remove this line if you'd rather not publish an email on a public page.

resume._file_note: Drop your resume as portfolio/resume.pdf in this repo and the Download button goes live automatically. If the file is missing the button shows a 'coming soon' state instead.
resume.blurb: A snapshot of my background, skills, and the work behind the projects below.

projects.name: MuseLearn
projects._live_note: Goes live after the muselearn Pages workflow runs and Pages is enabled (see the muselearn PR).
projects.blurb: A free, interactive platform that takes a complete beginner from “I’ve never opened a DAW” all the way to confidently producing, mixing, and mastering their own music. 34 guided lessons across Foundations, Production, Mixing, and Mastering — plus 8 hands-on audio demos synthesized live in the browser. Self-contained static site: no build, no accounts, progress saved locally.
highlights: 34 lessons taught in the order a real track is made
8 live Web Audio demos — 4-band EQ, compressor visualizer, 16-step beat maker, and more
Built-in quizzes, a 60+ term glossary, and local progress tracking

projects.name: Job Search
projects.blurb: A resume-driven job finder and application tracker. Point it at your resume and it pulls postings directly from ~60 company job boards — no aggregators — then ranks every posting against your resume with TF-IDF + K-means fit scoring and recency weighting. Ships a local web UI to track applications, auto-fill forms from your profile, sync confirmation emails, study a multi-discipline interview-prep curriculum, and see exactly why each job scored what it did.
highlights: Direct-from-source fetching across Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday + headless-Chromium scraping for boards with no API
TF-IDF + K-means “Fit map” that explains the score behind every match
Application tracker with profile auto-fill, email sync, and a parallel startup-only pipeline mined from the YC directory

projects.name: Marketing
projects._repo_note: Set this to 'Agangwani/<your-marketing-repo>' to wire the card link AND pull its daily activity. Until then the link falls back to the 'url' below.
projects.blurb: Marketing project — add a one-line description here. Set the “repo” field above to your marketing repository and this card will link straight to it and auto-update with its latest commits, just like the others.
